Technology
Catalog

Performance. Recovery. Longevity.

32 Technologies End-to-End Service Preferred Client Pricing

Overview

Fully integrated
environments for human
performance.

HPC delivers fully integrated environments designed to optimize performance, recovery, and longevity. Each technology is intentionally selected to enhance cellular health, physical output, and long-term vitality.

We provide end-to-end consultation, installation, operational, and ongoing support. HPC clients receive preferred pricing across every system in this catalog — significantly below public retail. No two HPC environments are identical. Every engagement begins with the client’s specific goals, space, and budget.

This document contains proprietary and confidential information belonging to Human Performance Centers LLC. It is intended solely for the private use of the recipient and may not be reproduced, distributed, shared, or disclosed to any third party without the express written consent of Human Performance Centers LLC.

Part One

Fundamental performance,
recovery & longevity technologies

Twenty-three flagship modalities. The backbone of every HPC installation, from private residence to clinical-grade facility. Each system is selected for clinical validity, operational reliability, and outcomes clients can feel and measure.

01

Pulse Centers — PEMF System

The gold-standard pulsed electromagnetic field therapy system, designed to enhance cellular communication and recovery across the entire body. Supports circulation, reduces inflammation, and improves cellular efficiency. Used clinically to reduce pain and accelerate healing of muscles, ligaments, bones, and tendons by activating the body’s natural regenerative processes.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $35,000–$45,000 · Rent-to-own from ~$1,500/month
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
02

Plunge All-In — Dry Sauna + Cold Plunge

Best-in-class sauna and cold plunge combination, recommended by Bryan Johnson as part of his Blueprint longevity protocol. The industrial-grade tub operates as both a cold plunge and hot tub, enabling contrast therapy protocols that drive circulation, reduce inflammation, activate cold-shock proteins, and accelerate full-body recovery.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $19,680 · Individual units available · Smaller formats at lower price points
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
03

HpoTech — Hyperbaric Oxygen Chamber (2.0–2.4 ATA)

High-pressure oxygen therapy system designed to deliver oxygen deep into tissues, accelerating healing and recovery. At 2.0–2.4 ATA, oxygen saturates plasma, red blood cells, and tissues that standard circulation cannot reach — including tendons, cartilage, and ligaments. A cornerstone of elite athletic and post-surgical recovery protocols worldwide.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $120,000–$200,000 · Lease ~$2,000–$4,000/month
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
04

NanoVi — Oxidative Stress Repair System

Signal-based technology that supports protein repair and reduces oxidative stress to improve cellular resilience. Research supports accelerated DNA repair, improved heart rate variability, faster recovery, and enhanced cognitive performance. Works synergistically with every other modality in the suite — functioning as a system-wide cellular amplifier. Peer-reviewed studies available upon request.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright ~$7,000–$14,500 (model-dependent) · 4 monthly installments available
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
05

ARRC LED — Elysium Bed

Best-in-class full-body red light therapy bed with integrated bioresonance technology. Delivers therapeutic wavelengths of red and near-infrared light alongside targeted frequency protocols, supporting mitochondrial energy production, cellular repair, skin rejuvenation, inflammation reduction, and nervous system balance. Designed for clinical and private residential environments at the highest standard of photobiomodulation available.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $180,000 · Lease pricing upon inquiry
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
06

TriFecta — Full Body Red Light Therapy Bed

Full-body red and near-infrared light system engineered to enhance mitochondrial output, accelerate tissue recovery, and support skin, hormonal, and metabolic health. Targets reduction of chronic and acute pain, tissue regeneration, wound healing, muscle recovery and conditioning, testosterone support, reduced inflammation, and skin rejuvenation.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright ~$67,000 · Lease available upon inquiry
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
07

StratosphereATC — Hypobaric Chamber

Flagship hypoxic training system engineered to simulate high-altitude environments at sea level. Drives measurable improvements in VO2 max, increases red blood cell and EPO production, enhances mitochondrial biogenesis, and accelerates full-body physiological adaptation. Used by professional athletes and elite performance centers globally. The most advanced altitude training system available for private installation.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright ~$2,000,000 · Lease: custom (contact HPC)
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
08

CVAC — Hypobaric Conditioning System

Advanced hypobaric conditioning system utilizing cyclical variations in hypoxia, pressure, and temperature to drive adaptation at the cellular level. Stimulates EPO production, increases red blood cell count, enhances VO2 max, and supports mitochondrial efficiency. A more compact and accessible alternative to full altitude chambers.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $148,000 + training and shipping
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
09

The Cloud — Mineral Vapor Therapy System

Hydrogen and mineral-rich vapor therapy system designed to support deep cellular hydration, respiratory health, detoxification, relaxation, and recovery. Delivers bioavailable hydrogen molecules via inhalation and skin absorption, reducing systemic oxidative stress while promoting parasympathetic nervous system activation. An elegant and highly differentiated wellness installation for premium private environments.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $3,000 + installation
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
10

HOCATT — Ozone Sauna System

Multi-modality therapeutic system combining transdermal ozone therapy, far-infrared heat, carbonic acid, high-intensity PEMF, microcurrent technology, ultraviolet irradiation, photon color therapy, exercise with oxygen, whole-body hyperthermia, and essential oil infusions — simultaneously. HOCATT delivers ten modalities in a single 30-minute session.

Preferred Client Pricing
Pricing upon inquiry · Lease available
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
11

LongevityLabs — Ozone Sauna

Clinical-grade ozone sauna system delivering transdermal ozone therapy combined with heat to support detoxification, immune modulation, enhanced circulation, and cellular oxygenation. Ozone therapy has been used in integrative and longevity medicine for decades for its oxidative and regenerative effects. A clean, elegant, and highly effective standalone modality for any serious performance or wellness environment.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $11,000 · Lease pricing upon inquiry
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
12

Therabody — Recovery Suite

Percussive therapy and pneumatic compression systems designed to improve circulation, accelerate muscle recovery, and reduce soreness. The Therabody suite includes Theragun Pro devices and JetBoots compression boots, providing immediate post-training or post-procedure recovery support. Highly portable, clinically validated, and used by professional sports organizations globally.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $500–$2,500
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
13

QCell³ — Bioenergetic System

Integrated bioenergetic scanning and frequency therapy platform combining advanced diagnostics with targeted frequency support. The QCell³ identifies areas of cellular stress or dysfunction and applies precision frequency protocols to restore energetic coherence, support detoxification pathways, and accelerate healing. Represents the cutting edge of bioenergetic medicine and is used in elite integrative health practices.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $30,000–$68,600 · Lease: case-by-case
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
14

Equiscope — Electro-Equiscope System

FDA-registered, non-invasive neuro-muscular electrotherapy device using intelligent microcurrents to detect and correct cellular electrical imbalances. Targets pain reduction, inflammation resolution, and accelerated tissue repair through a drug-free, non-surgical approach. Widely used in both human and equine rehabilitation for chronic pain, acute injuries, and cellular metabolism enhancement.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright ~$20,000–$30,000 · Lease: case-by-case
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
15

Keiser — Pneumatic Performance Equipment

Air-powered resistance training systems engineered for strength, speed, power development, and rehabilitation with minimal joint strain. Pneumatic resistance provides smooth, consistent force curves that cannot be replicated with free weights or cable systems, making Keiser ideal for post-injury reconditioning, explosive athletic training, and senior longevity programming. Trusted by professional sports franchises and elite performance facilities worldwide.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $10,000–$250,000 (depending on configuration) · Lease: custom
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
16

Vital Reaction — Hydrogen Inhalation System

Molecular hydrogen delivery system supporting mitochondrial efficiency and reducing systemic oxidative stress. Molecular hydrogen (H₂) is the smallest and most bioavailable antioxidant known, selectively neutralizing the most harmful free radicals without disrupting beneficial oxidative processes. Supports cognitive clarity, athletic performance, and long-term cellular health.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $6,995
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
17

Sunlighten — Full Spectrum Infrared Sauna

Full-spectrum infrared sauna system delivering near, mid, and far-infrared wavelengths for comprehensive detoxification, circulation enhancement, cardiovascular conditioning, and recovery support. Infrared heat penetrates tissue more deeply than conventional saunas at lower ambient temperatures, enabling longer and more comfortable sessions with superior outcomes.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright pricing upon inquiry
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
18

Axis Saunas — Fusion 2.0 Elite

Premium architectural infrared sauna featuring a combination of far-infrared panels and traditional Finnish-style heat for a dual-modality thermal experience. The Fusion 2.0 Elite is designed for luxury residential installations, offering full-spectrum infrared therapy with the aesthetic and experiential quality expected in ultra-premium home environments.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright pricing upon inquiry
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
19

Clearwater — Cold Plunge

High-performance, self-contained, and self-cleaning electric cold therapy system engineered for premium residential and commercial environments. Provides precise temperature control for targeted cold immersion therapy, supporting inflammation reduction, fat loss activation, enhanced circulation, energy and mood elevation, and mental resilience training. A clean and reliable standalone cold therapy solution at an accessible entry price point.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright $1,770
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
20

BioCharger — Subtle Energy Platform

Multi-frequency subtle energy platform combining pulsed electromagnetic fields, photonic light, harmonic resonance, and voltage to restore cellular energy and optimize recovery. Used by elite athletes, biohackers, and longevity practitioners to reduce recovery time, improve sleep quality, elevate energy levels, and support mental clarity. Tony Robbins, Dave Asprey, and numerous professional sports organizations incorporate BioCharger into their protocols.

Preferred Client Pricing

Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
21

ARX — Adaptive Resistance Exercise System

Motor-driven adaptive resistance training system that provides precisely calibrated, computer-controlled resistance throughout the full range of motion — both concentrically and eccentrically. ARX delivers a full high-intensity workout in under 10 minutes with zero risk of overexertion, making it ideal for time-constrained executives, post-injury rehabilitation, and longevity-focused strength training.

Preferred Client Pricing
Pricing upon inquiry · Contact HPC for preferred client pricing
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
22

VASPER — Compression + Cooling Exercise System

Patented exercise system combining full-body compression, cooling, and interval training to simulate the physiological effects of a 2-hour high-intensity workout in 21 minutes. VASPER triggers significant lactic acid and growth hormone release through localized compression and cooling while performing low-impact exercise.

Preferred Client Pricing

23

OXEFIT — AI-Powered Strength System

Intelligent, AI-powered resistance training platform combining adaptive robotics, real-time biomechanical analysis, and personalized programming. OXEFIT adjusts resistance dynamically based on force output, identifies asymmetries, and tracks progress with clinical precision — making it one of the most advanced smart strength systems available for private installation.

Part Two

Intelligent add-ons

Nine supplementary systems that complete an HPC environment. The details that compound — daily-use tools, sleep optimization, water and light infrastructure, diagnostics, and cognitive performance.

A

EightSleep — Sleep Optimization System

The definitive sleep optimization platform, combining active temperature regulation, biometric sleep tracking, heart rate monitoring, and HRV analysis within the mattress cover. EightSleep automatically adjusts surface temperature throughout the night based on real-time sleep stage data, consistently improving deep sleep and recovery metrics. Bryan Johnson’s Blueprint protocol lists EightSleep as a foundational longevity tool.

Preferred Client Pricing
~$3,000 + small monthly subscription
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
B

BEMER — PEMF Microcirculation System

Targeted pulsed electromagnetic field system specifically designed to improve microcirculation and vascular performance. BEMER’s patented signal enhances blood flow at the capillary level, increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to tissues throughout the body. Used in integrative medicine, post-surgical recovery, and high-performance athletic programs for its measurable effects on circulation and cellular health.

Preferred Client Pricing
Outright ~$5,000–$7,000 · Lease available
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
C

Ray Lighting — Circadian Lighting System

Architectural lighting system calibrated to natural circadian rhythms, dynamically adjusting color temperature and intensity throughout the day to support optimal cortisol and melatonin production. Circadian-aligned lighting has been shown to improve sleep quality, hormonal balance, energy levels, mood, and recovery.

Preferred Client Pricing
Custom · Contact HPC for installation consultation
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
D

Ophora — Water Filtration System

Ultra-premium water purification and oxygenation system delivering structured, mineral-balanced, oxygen-enriched hydration at every tap. Ophora systems remove contaminants, restructure water at the molecular level, and add therapeutic minerals and dissolved oxygen. Available in countertop, whole-home, and estate-level configurations.

Preferred Client Pricing
Custom · Contact HPC for configuration and pricing
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
E

BrainTap — Neural Optimization Headset

Guided meditation and brainwave entrainment headset utilizing pulsed light, binaural audio, and guided meditations to optimize brainwave states, reduce stress hormones, improve sleep, and enhance cognitive performance. BrainTap sessions produce measurable shifts in HRV and brainwave patterns within minutes.

F

High-frequency vibration therapy device delivering targeted relief for mobility restrictions, fascial adhesions, scar tissue, and circulation enhancement. G

InBody — 770 Body Composition Analyzer

Professional-grade bioelectrical impedance body composition analyzer delivering clinical-precision metrics on muscle mass distribution, body fat percentage, water retention, inflammation levels, segmental analysis, whole-body phase angle (cellular health), and visceral fat. The gold standard in body composition measurement used by hospitals, professional sports organizations, and elite performance centers globally.

~$21,505
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
H

miHealth 2.0 — Biofeedback & Electrostimulation Device

Handheld biofeedback and targeted electrostimulation device that rapidly identifies areas of energetic imbalance and delivers corrective electrical signals to accelerate healing, reduce pain, and restore tissue function. Used in integrative medicine practices and professional sports settings.

$5,300
Significant savings off retail · Contact HPC to engage
I

Ping Pong Table — Cognitive Performance Addition

Premium performance-lifestyle addition supporting coordination, bilateral motor integration, reflex development, and social engagement. HPC Services

Human Performance Centers provides complete end-to-end service for every engagement.

+
